boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Transfer release matches all elements and grants authority.

final_answer: The action may proceed. Transfer release REL-YAR-079 precisely matches the required dataset, workspace, entity, and date, crucially confirming transfer authority pre-execution. While DES-YAR-079 is planning-only and lacks execution authority, it does not present an open defect. The source boundary is confirmed closed, allowing the export.
open_blockers: DES-YAR-079 planning-only resolved; DES-YAR-079 does not provide execution authority
